title: Pyramid Texts, Utterance 217: The King Ascends to Heaven
description: The oldest religious texts in the world — spells for the pharaoh's ascent to the stars.
introduction: The oldest religious texts in the world — spells for the pharaoh's ascent to the stars.

translation.original_text: ḥꜥ.k Wnis m sšd m-ḫnt Jḫmw-sk
translation.text: You shall ascend, O Unas, as a star, as the morning star among the Imperishable Stars.
